heading: FLAG AND SEAL, SEAT OF GOVERNMENT, AND THE STATES
label: 4 FLAG AND SEAL, SEAT OF GOVERNMENT, AND THE STATES
notes: This title was enacted by ,act July 30, 1947, ch. 389, § 161 Stat. 641
Amendments1951—, , added item for chapter 5.Act Oct. 31, 1951, ch. 655, § 1165 Stat. 713

Positive Law; CitationThis title has been made positive law by section 1 of , , which provided in part that:act July 30, 1947, ch. 38961 Stat. 641“title 4 of the United States Code, entitled ‘Flag and seal, Seat of Government, and the States’, is codified and enacted into positive law and may be cited as ‘4 U. S. C., § —’ ”.

RepealsSection 2 of act , provided that the sections or parts thereof of the Statutes at Large or the Revised Statutes covering provisions codified in this Act are repealed insofar as the provisions appeared in former Title 4, and provided that any rights or liabilities now existing under the repealed sections or parts thereof shall not be affected by the repeal.July 30, 1947
